source: Focus On Digital Science investor deck PDF (May 2026) — colours sampled from rendered pages, logo extracted from closing slide (p48)
usage: Branding reference only — not business data. For internal demo/client work on the DONNA app.

gradient.note: The deck uses a diagonal magenta→coral→orange sweep; exact stops vary slide to slide. The css value above is the harmonised version used across the DONNA UI.

secondaryAccents.note: Lifted from the product-lifecycle ring and icon accents in the deck — used for charts and status.

display.treatment: Condensed, uppercase, 500–700 weight — stand-in for the deck's condensed display face
display.note: Reckitt's actual corporate typefaces are licensed and not embedded extractably in the PDF. Oswald (Google Fonts) is the closest freely available match for demo use; swap for the licensed face before anything client-facing beyond demo.

body.treatment: 400–600, sentence case, geometric humanist — matches the deck's rounded body style

components.eyebrowDevice: Short skewed gradient tick (skewX -30°) before uppercase eyebrow labels — mirrors the deck's angled header cut
components.kpiStyle: Oversized condensed numerals with gradient or slate fill, small uppercase label above

files.reckitt-logo-white.png: Full lockup (mark + wordmark), white, transparent — for gradient/dark surfaces
files.reckitt-logo-pink.png: Full lockup, Reckitt pink #E4007C, transparent — for white/light surfaces
files.reckitt-logo-slate.png: Full lockup, slate ink, transparent — for muted/footer use
files.reckitt-logomark-pink.png: Spiral mark only, pink — used in the DONNA topbar
files.reckitt-logo-on-gradient.png: Original extraction reference from the deck closing slide

logos.provenance: Rasterised at 400dpi from p48 of the PDF and alpha-masked; ~1250px wide. For print or large-format, request the vector originals from Reckitt brand team.
